title: Paper Stasis Fixer
description: This plugin makes wireless stasis chambers work on Paper and PurPur servers by making it so whenever a fishing rod is used on a pressure plate, it spawns an invisible entity that stays on the pressure plate until the fishing rod is reeled in.
body:
This plugin makes wireless stasis chambers work on Paper and Purpur servers by making it so whenever a fishing rod is cast onto a pressure plate, it spawns an invisible armor stand that gets deleted once the rod gets reeled in.

No nether portals are required for the stasis to work, you can simply throw your ender pearl into the stasis chamber, and cast your fishing rod onto the pressure plate and simply walk away and pull it whenever you need to. Logging off will not effect your fishing rod's connection to the stasis chamber.

As of vers 1.0.2, you are only able to use one fishing rod per person, but in later versions I hope to make it possible for one person to be able to use multiple rods for different pressure plates.
